output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?startDate WHERE {
  wd:Q22841 wdt:P585 ?startDate .
}
ORDER BY ?startDate
LIMIT 1
